name_en: Small [Waxed Black Silver] First batch available💥
name_cn:
Small [Waxed Black Silver] First batch available💥
Balenciaga New Monaco Series. The soft Monaco indeed gives a very relaxed feeling. A bag as soft as a pillow, satisfying various styling needs. The bag body is flexible and textured. Made of super soft calfskin, creating rich layers with soft leather, adorned with the classic rounded BB logo, and is very spacious.
Don't miss out, fashionistas must have this one.
Model: 80026
Medium Size: Base Length 32.5 x Height 22 x Width 9.9cm
Small: Base Length 27 x Height 18 x Width 9.9cm
